untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific yearly price range position (better performance within first third of yearly low) which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Doji identification relies on precise body_pct threshold which is approximated but not fully validated. Breakout direction timing differences (downward vs upward) and success rate metrics are AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified.
translation_notes: Doji approximated as body_pct < 5% (small body relative to range). Upward breakout entry requires close > prev_close after doji; downward breakout entry requires close < prev_close. Exit triggered by reversal direction. Hold period set to 8 days (upper bound of 6-8 day range). Note: True doji validation (open ≈ close, specific wick ratios) and yearly range positioning cannot be fully expressed with available indicators.
